content: node --test accepts explicit file paths and glob patterns as final args. Shell glob expansion (test/*.test.mjs) does NOT recurse into subdirs. Must pass explicit subdir globs: 'test/*.test.mjs test/**/*.test.mjs' or use quoted globs '"test/**/*.test.mjs"' so node handles expansion. Node 20+ glob support is built-in; Node 18 requires shell expansion. The npm test script already has the correct pattern but CI still uses the old 'test/*.test.mjs' only. Fix: update ci.yml run line to match package.json test script.
